Author: greenteakitkats
Name: A Room Reborn
Description: A running log of everything you do while decorating your house, indoors and out in the yard: placing, removing, storing, moving, rotating, and dyeing furniture, all with coordinates. Forgot what you just changed, or moved something and want it back? Click a coordinate to move the selected item there, or hit Undo on any move to snap it back automatically. Also shows what changed while you were away, and keeps a separate history for each of your houses. Built to sit alongside Burning Down the House. Type /houselog to open it.
